parameters: This is not where I should be going.
--Once I open this door, there will be no turning back.
\sa[123]\SE[38-nb]What's up? You said you had something urgent to talk about...
Heh, kidding. Was that a bit too barefaced?
\SE[22]Eheheh, sorry. You've got such a serious face right now,
it made my heart pound a bit.
I nodded my head, and looked her straight into the eyes.
Having known me for years at this point already... she realized the seriousness of
it all, and let out a slightly bewildered laugh.
\SE[54-nb]I see, it's already over, huh... Of course.
The feelings I have never communicated to her, until now. The feelings towards the girl

in front of me, that I've spent all these years almost like family with. Feelings that I must 
tell her about.
--I finally managed to, put them into words.
\SE[4]...Mmm. Could you let me hear it... one more time?
"As a woman", I told her bewildered self.
My lips went dry, and I started taking quick, short breaths, as if the oxygen in the room
thinned out. Could she hear my heart slamming against my chest? I hope not.
\SE[18]Eheheh... I knew it, but it still surprised me.
I mean, you've never been good at expressing stuff like that, \n[1].
\SE[21]I really used to think that you didn't see me as a
...I felt a wave of regret wash over me as I realized just
how much I dragged things out with this girl that I've known for a dozen years.
\se[4]You know, \n[1]. I'm really happy, I am.
\SE[54-nb]All these years, you've protected me from so much.
Saved me from so much. ...I know it all, you know.
\SE[18]It wasn't all fun times until now but,
because you were here with me, I was able to laugh a lot.
\SE[22]...I love you too, \n[1]. And these feelings
have never changed, and won't ever change.
Chewing on her words, my face heated up.
As I start looking forward to the days that will surely begin from now on....
I told her the words I've always wanted to tell her.
I want you to be mine, to stay with me.
I want you to be mine, to stay with me.
\SE[4]Okay, if you're fine with a girl like me.
\se[32-nb]I want you to be with me... forever.
Seems like Rino nee-san's not in.
